title: Gold Birthday Candles for Cakes,12 Pieces Metallic Glitter Cake Candles Tall Birthday Cake Candles with Holder for Birthday Wedding Party Decoration (Gold)
features: 【Products Include】: you will get 12 pcs golden cake candles, the total length of the candle is 13cm/5.2in, and the length of the holder is 3cm/1.2inch. You can cut the candle to any length you need according to the size of the cake.

【Premium and Safe Materials】: Birthday candles are made of high-quality paraffin, which is safe, non-toxic and tasteless, environmentally friendly and biodegradable, and will not lose wax after burning for a long time. It is an ideal candle for birthday cakes.

【Exquisite Design】: The birthday cake candles are covered with golden tin foil, which is elegant and fashionable, and has a detachable bracket, which can be easily inserted into the cake and firmly fixed, and it can be perfectly matched with any cake.

【Excellent Performance】: Birthday candles are easy to light, and burn with a stable flame after being lit. The golden candles will make your cake look more beautiful. Singing and wishing to the candles at this time will definitely leave you an unforgettable memory.

【Multiple Uses】: Birthday cake candles are suitable for various parties and occasions, such as birthdays, wedding parties, anniversaries, Christmas or holiday celebrations and other occasions. The candlelight will definitely create a romantic atmosphere for you.
